ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "goods" TEXT /* Type of goods represented by the item */,
  "probability" INTEGER /* Probability of obtaining the item */,
  "unlock_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the item can be unlocked */,
  "order_value_multiplier" INTEGER /* Multiplier for calculating the order value */,
  "order_receiver" TEXT /* Name of the factory or provider fulfilling the order */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., boost, currency, equipment) */,
  "item_rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item (e.g., common, rare, legendary) */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item's effects or usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player for notifications */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the player in the game */,
  "total_items" INTEGER /* Total count of items owned by the player */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points accumulated by the player */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the player's last login */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the player registered for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who placed the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the order calculated based on the item's multiplier */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, fulfilled, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factories" (
  "factory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factory */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the factory */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the factory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the factory */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the factory based on player reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_probabilities" (
  "probability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each probability entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item associated with the probability */,
  "probability_value" INTEGER /* Probability value indicating the chance of obtaining the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("probability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_probabilities_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_unlock_levels" (
  "unlock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unlock level entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item that can be unlocked */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level at which the item becomes available to the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unlock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_unlock_levels_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item related to the statistics */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the item has been used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date when the item was last used by any player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_statistics_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_items" (
  "player_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-item entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who owns the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item owned by the player */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item owned by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_items_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the player */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points accumulated by the player */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date when the player's progress was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progress_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factory_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who submitted the review */,
  "factory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the factory being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the player (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factory_reviews_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factory_reviews_factory_id FOREIGN KEY ("factory_id") REFERENCES factories ("factory_id")
)
